action.reasoning: Observation: 40-seed ensemble achieved 0.7669 AUC, new best. Time 0.3h, 10 iters left. Each more-seed batch takes ~3-4 min. Analysis: Diminishing returns from more seeds. Risk of running out of time. Decision: Stop here to lock in best score.
action.done_reason: Best AUC 0.7669 with 40-seed ensemble. Diminishing returns and limited remaining time/iterations make further experiments risky.
